title: 2026 Golden Globes: Best Supporting Actress Predictions
text: Should Win: Amy Madigan (Weapons). Will Win: Amy Madigan (Weapons). The author describes Madigan's performance as otherworldly and considers her role the year's best villain. He believes her portrayal will likely earn her an Oscar nomination as well. Though Ariana Grande delivered strong work in Wicked: For Good, the author suggests any other year would favor her, but Madigan's acclaimed performance stands above the competition this cycle. Television - Supporting Role: Should Win: Erin Doherty (Adolescence). Will Win: Erin Doherty (Adolescence). The author notes that Doherty won the Emmy and expects her to replicate that success at the Golden Globes. He emphasizes she deserves recognition equally as her male co-stars in the same production.
